title: Lack of explicit venue and vault consistency checks when creating pool requests
description: When creating pool requests, there are no explicit checks to ensure that the specified venue and vault are consistent (e.g., that the vault belongs to the specified venue). This could allow pool creation with mismatched venue/vault combinations, leading to operational issues.
recommendation: Add validation that the venue and vault referenced in pool creation requests are consistent with each other.

oracle.description: Pool creation does not validate consistency between venue and vault references.
oracle.static_signal: Create/exercise that references multiple related entities (venue, vault) without asserting their relationship

notes: Common pattern: multiple related entity references without cross-validation of their relationships.
